race.comment: YES ARNIE (6) is well weighted today after failing narrowly with the 59kg to run a close-up second over 1405m at the Sapphire Coast. Key jockey change and ready to win. STILL RISING (3) frustrated the stable last time in and resumes after disappointing when stretching out to the 1850m last start. Fitted with a solid 1000m trial win at Beaumont ( Newcastle). Respect. LILII BOREA (9) up in class and trip at her fourth career start with a fading seventh over 1400m at Newcastle. Gets weight relief with the claim and can take a hand in the finish today. DANCING TILDA (2) holding his form and comes here in peak condition fourth-up. Ran on late with a handy fourth over 1400m at Coffs Harbour. First time on a heavy track and stays in the mix.
